## Brent Crude Oil Spot Price — June 16, 2026

### Current Price

| Source | Price (USD/bbl) | Change | Updated |
|---|---|---|---|
| **OilPrice.com** | **$83.24** | +$0.07 (+0.08%) | ~11 mins ago (intraday) |

The slight discrepancy between sources reflects real-time vs. settlement timing. The **converging range is approximately $83.07–$83.31 per barrel** as of June 16, 2026.

### Key Context

- **Direction today**: Brent is trading **slightly up** on the day (+0.08% to +0.17%), with a green/positive indicator on oilprice.com.
- **Previous close**: ~$83.17 (implied from the +0.17% change to $83.31).
- **Monthly trend**: According to Trading Economics, Brent's price has **fallen 25.68% over the past month**, suggesting a significant recent decline from higher levels (implying prices were around ~$112/bbl roughly a month ago).
- **Year-over-year**: Brent is still **8.97% higher than one year ago** (June 2025), when it was approximately $76/bbl.
- **WTI Crude comparison**: WTI is trading at $80.90/bbl (+$0.15, +0.19%), putting the Brent-WTI spread at approximately $2.34/bbl.
